briefdescription.para: Access the buffer.
Decode all characters using a custom function.

parameterdescription.para: The function that receives each decoded code point.
How UTF-8 decoding errors are handled.
If encodingErrors is EncodingErrors::Throw and the data is invalid UTF-8.

briefdescription.para: Decode all characters and throw on malformed UTF-8.

parameterdescription.para: The function that receives each decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Decode all characters and skip malformed UTF-8 bytes.

parameterdescription.para: The function that receives each decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Decode all characters and replace each malformed UTF-8 byte with U+FFFD.

parameterdescription.para: The function that receives each decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Decode one code point.

detaileddescription.para:
Expects that the given view contains exactly one UTF-8 encoded code point.
encodingErrors
How UTF-8 decoding errors are handled.
The decoded code point.
std::invalid_argument
If the view does not contain exactly one decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Decode one code point and throw on malformed UTF-8.

parameterdescription.para: If the view does not contain exactly one decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Decode one code point and skip malformed UTF-8 bytes.

parameterdescription.para: If the view does not contain exactly one decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Decode one code point and replace malformed UTF-8 bytes with U+FFFD.

parameterdescription.para: If the view does not contain exactly one decoded code point.

briefdescription.para: Parse one UTF-8 code point from the buffer at the given byte offset.

parameterdescription.para: The byte offset into the buffer.

simplesect.para: The parsing status, code point, and consumed byte count.

briefdescription.para: Throw an encoding error.

parameterdescription.para: The diagnostic text.
Always thrown.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of UTF-8 bytes required to encode a Unicode code point.

parameterdescription.para: The Unicode code point.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of bytes expected for a UTF-8 sequence from its first byte.

parameterdescription.para: The leading byte of the sequence.

simplesect.para: The expected byte count, or 0 for an invalid leading byte.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::span< T > buffer, std::size_t &position, const EncodingErrors encodingErrors)
memberdef.name: decodeChar

briefdescription.para: Decode a single UTF-8 character in the buffer and advance the position.

parameterdescription.para: The byte buffer to decode.
The read position that is advanced after a successful read.
How malformed UTF-8 is handled.

simplesect.para: The decoded code point. For Ignore, returns 0 with an unchanged position if no further code point can be decoded.

parameterdescription.para: If encodingErrors is EncodingErrors::Throw and the data is invalid UTF-8.

briefdescription.para: Decode one UTF-8 code point and throw on malformed UTF-8.

parameterdescription.para: The byte buffer to decode.
The read position that is advanced after a successful read.
If the data is invalid UTF-8.

briefdescription.para: Decode one UTF-8 code point and skip malformed UTF-8 bytes.

parameterdescription.para: The byte buffer to decode.
The read position that is advanced after a successful read.

simplesect.para: The decoded code point. Returns 0 with an unchanged position if no further code point can be decoded.

briefdescription.para: Decode one UTF-8 code point and replace malformed UTF-8 bytes with U+FFFD.

parameterdescription.para: The byte buffer to decode.
The read position that is advanced after a successful read.

briefdescription.para: Encode a Unicode character into UTF-8 format and append it to the string.

memberdef.definition: static std::basic_string< std::remove_const_t< T > > erbsland::cterm::impl::U8Buffer< T >::encodeString
memberdef.name: encodeString

briefdescription.para: Encode a UTF-32 string as UTF-8.

detaileddescription.para:
Invalid code points are replaced with U+FFFD.
text
The UTF-32 text to encode.
The encoded UTF-8 string.

briefdescription.para: A safe and reliable UTF-8 decoder/encoder.
